description: Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Git, and responsive web design. Willingness to learn modern web technologies and work collaboratively on real-world projects.

Basic knowledge of video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar), content writing, social media content creation, and AI tools like ChatGPT. Creative mindset and good communication skills are a plus.

Basic knowledge of digital marketing & lead generation, social media platforms, SEO fundamentals, content promotion, and analytics. Strong communication skills and eagerness to learn marketing strategies.
